records.ety: [L. palmatus marked with the palm of a hand, from palma the palm of the hand.]

defs: Having the shape of the hand; resembling a hand with the fingers spread.
Spreading from the apex of a petiole, as the divisions of a leaf, or leaflets, so as to resemble the hand with outspread fingers.
Having the anterior toes united by a web, as in most swimming birds; webbed. See Illust. (i) under Aves.
Having the distal portion broad, flat, and more or less divided into lobes; -- said of certain corals, antlers, etc.
